message:
feat: add similarity functions, expand nn modules, and rewrite optimizer suite

Major expansion across the three core frankentorch crates:

API (ft-api — +466 lines):
- Add cosine_similarity() with eps-clamped denominator to prevent
  division by zero on zero-norm inputs
- Add pairwise_distance() (Euclidean, p-norm) for batch distance
  computation along arbitrary dimensions
- Add triplet_margin_loss() combining anchor-positive and anchor-
  negative distance with configurable margin and p-norm
- Add kl_div_loss() (Kullback-Leibler divergence) with log_target
  option and sum/mean/batchmean/none reduction modes
- Add smooth_l1_loss() (Huber loss) with configurable beta threshold
- Add multi_margin_loss() for SVM-style multi-class classification
- Add cosine_embedding_loss() for learning embeddings via cosine
  similarity with margin
- Add hinge_embedding_loss() for metric learning with binary labels

Neural Network modules (ft-nn — +447 lines):
- Add TransformerEncoderLayer with configurable self-attention heads,
  feedforward dimension, dropout, layer norm, and activation function
- Add TransformerEncoder stacking multiple encoder layers with optional
  final layer norm
- Add GRU (Gated Recurrent Unit) cell with input/hidden/bias gates
- Add GRUCell for single-step GRU computation
- Add LSTMCell for single-step LSTM with cell state management
- Add InstanceNorm (1d/2d) for per-instance feature normalization
- Add GroupNorm for channel-group normalization
- Add PixelShuffle for sub-pixel convolution upsampling
- Add AdaptiveAvgPool2d for target-size-aware spatial pooling

Optimizer suite (ft-optim — major rewrite, +2734/-775):
- Complete rewrite of the optimizer infrastructure with trait-based
  architecture supporting per-parameter-group hyperparameters
- SGD: add Nesterov momentum, dampening, weight decay (L2 and decoupled)
- Adam: full implementation with bias correction, AMSGrad variant,
  epsilon, and decoupled weight decay (AdamW mode)
- AdaGrad: adaptive learning rates with initial accumulator value
- RMSprop: centered and non-centered variants with momentum support
- Add learning rate scheduler infrastructure: StepLR, MultiStepLR,
  ExponentialLR, CosineAnnealingLR, ReduceLROnPlateau (with patience,
  threshold, cooldown), CyclicLR (triangular, triangular2, exp_range),
  OneCycleLR with three-phase annealing
- Add gradient clipping utilities: clip_grad_norm_ and clip_grad_value_
- Add optimizer state serialization/deserialization for checkpointing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
